pattern: Track the prefix sum minimum; the start value must be large enough to keep every prefix sum at least 1, so it equals max(1, 1 - min_prefix_sum).
hints: Simulate the prefix sums and find the minimum running total reached.
If the minimum prefix sum is already at least 1, you only need startValue=1 (positive requirement).
Otherwise, you need startValue = 1 - (minimum prefix sum) to lift the lowest dip up to 1.

edge_inputs.description: single element equal to zero — but constraints say -100 to 100, so use 1
dip happens mid-array, not at start
alternating values cancel out except one dip
maximum length array of minimum values

stress.description: random arrays with mixed positive and negative values
stress.generator_python:
def gen(rng, size):
    n = rng.randint(1, min(size, 100))
    nums = [rng.randint(-100, 100) for _ in range(n)]
    return [nums]
